articles.title: The CLARITY Act will help reshore the crypto industry in the US — Attorney
articles.description: The "biggest market" in crypto is conducting the vast majority of its trading volume outside of US-based exchanges, according to Attorney Bill Hughes.

articles.title: The Nobitex dilemma: How Iran's biggest crypto exchange stays off the OFAC blacklist
articles.description: Iran entered the final night of February 2026 under a near-total internet shutdown. In the wake of a joint strike by the United States and Israel, Tehran almost completely severed the country's connection to the global internet — likely leaving only users on a government whitelist with access to the

articles.title: Trump Media’s Q1 loss widens to $406 million on bitcoin, CRO markdowns
articles.description: The loss was primarily driven by $244 million in unrealized losses on cryptocurrency holdings and an additional $108.2 million investment loss.

articles.title: Sports betting should be regulated as a financial product, not gambling, aspiring prediction market provider says
articles.description: Novig CEO Jacob Fortinsky said his company will transition to a federal Designated Contract Market framework this summer to launch in all 50 states, while 57 Maiden's Adam Mastrelli said he was banned from two major sportsbooks within two months for being “sharp."

articles.title: 凌日法外的救星，研究團隊利用「拱線進動」揪出 27 個隱藏在雙星系統中的系外行星
articles.description: 由美國太空總署主導的系外行星搜尋任務 TESS 至今已確認了 885 顆系外行星，並辨識出超過 7,900 顆 […]

articles.title: It might be too late for bitcoin’s quantum migration, Project Eleven report argues
articles.description: Quantum computing does not only pose a risk to up to $3 trillion in digital assets, it also threatens the security of banking systems, military communications, digital identities and more, Project Eleven’s report warns.

articles.title: Crypto industry cheers Senate Clarity Act markup date as market structure push resumes
articles.description: The bill's progress follows talks on jurisdiction, consumer/developer protections, and stablecoin rewards, with crypto firms backing a yield compromise.

articles.title: The Instax Wide 400 builds on instant photography’s simplicity and stretches it, literally
articles.description: In an AI and digital world, analog instant film and retro-style cameras continue to remain popular, fueled by a mix of both nostalgia and novelty.

articles.title: Emerging-market users are treating crypto exchanges like banking apps, Binance says
articles.description: One point three billion adults lack financial services, 4.7 billion lack credit, and 1.4 billion savers in low-income nations earn no deposit interest, Binance said.

articles.title: Why a 2017 Linux bug is now a major concern for the crypto industry
articles.description:
The “Copy Fail” Linux bug could impact crypto infrastructure that relies on Linux servers, highlighting growing cybersecurity risks in the digital asset industry.
Format: Explained

articles.title: Swiss central bank bitcoin reserve push fails over signature shortfall
articles.description: The initiative sought to amend Switzerland's constitution, requiring the Swiss National Bank (SNB) to hold BTC alongside gold and foreign-currency reserves.

articles.title: CME is set to let traders bet on bitcoin volatility, not just price
articles.description: CME Group plans to launch bitcoin volatility futures on June 1 pending regulatory approval bringing a easy way to bet on the degree of price swings.

articles.title: Nvidia has already committed $40B to equity AI deals this year
articles.description: Nvidia continues to be a big investor in the AI ecosystem.

articles.title: How DeFi is changing the financial landscape for Latin Americans
articles.description: DeFi is quietly shifting from niche crypto experiment to a legitimate financial tool across the region, explains Serrano.

articles.title: TeraWulf doubles AI revenue but posts $427M quarterly loss as mining income declines
articles.description: TeraWulf’s HPC lease revenue jumped 117% quarter-on-quarter to $21 million, but a $427 million net loss highlights the costs of transitioning from Bitcoin mining to AI infrastructure.

articles.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
articles.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3 and crypto regulation.

articles.title: Crypto wallets are being rebuilt for AI agents, Trust Wallet and Mesh executives say at Consensus Miami
articles.description: Trust Wallet CEO Felix Fan and Mesh CTO Arjun Mukherjee said AI agents are creating a new role for crypto wallets.

articles.title: BlackRock deepens tokenization push with new onchain fund offerings
articles.description: The world's largest asset manager filed paperwork to expand its tokenized fund lineup as real-world assets grow 200% year over year.

articles.title: LayerZero says it ‘made a mistake’ in $292 Million Kelp exploit
articles.description: After initially framing the exploit as a developer configuration failure, LayerZero said it “owns” the decision to let its own verifier secure high-value transfers in a vulnerable setup.
